import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut current = 0
  mut has = false
  mut neg = false
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
      if has
        if neg
          result = list.push(result, 0 - current)
        else
          result = list.push(result, current)
        end
        current = 0
        has = false
        neg = false
      end
    else if b == 45 and not has
      neg = true
    else
      current = current * 10 + (b - 48)
      has = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has
    if neg
      result = list.push(result, 0 - current)
    else
      result = list.push(result, current)
    end
  end
  result
end
